name: Yii2 PHP & MariaDB (Fixed)
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y default-mysql-server && sudo service mariadb start && sleep 10 && sudo mariadb -u root -e "DROP USER IF EXISTS 'pubman_app'@'localhost'; CREATE USER 'pubman_app'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'pubmanapp'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'pubman_app'@'localhost' WITH GRANT OPTION; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;" && sudo mariadb -u root < ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/schema.sql
